title: Republicans seek $1 billion to boost security for White House ballroom
shortDescription: Republicans are seeking $1 billion in taxpayer money for security related to President Trump's ballroom, setting up a showdown with Democrats.

title: Why the Indiana election results are significant for Trump
shortDescription: Trump's allies ousted five Indiana GOP senators who blocked redistricting, signaling his continued sway over the party.

title: Trump reignites feud with Pope ahead of Rubio's Vatican visit
shortDescription: The president and Pope Leo are trading pointed remarks again over the Iran war, days before Secretary of State Marco Rubio's Vatican visit this week.

title: Trump renews clash with Pope over Iran remarks
shortDescription: Trump criticizes Pope Leo over Iran nuclear weapons as Vatican prepares for Marco Rubio visit amid rising US Vatican tensions.

title: See logo for Palm Beach's newly renamed Trump International Airport
shortDescription: The new, all-gold logo, recommended by the Trump Organization, has as an eagle holding two olive branches.

title: See Trump news, updates and schedule from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Indiana voters mostly sided with Trump-backed candidates in primaries. Trump reinstated the Presidential Fitness Test Award. “Project Freedom” ended days after it started.

title: Michigan election results: Firefighter's win seals blue state Senate
shortDescription: Democrats retain control of battleground state's Senate.

title: FAA employee charged with threatening to kill Donald Trump
shortDescription: Dean DelleChiaie, a mechanical engineering contractor for the Federal Aviation Administration, allegedly sent a threat by email to the White House.

title: Trump pauses 'Project Freedom' in Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: President Donald Trump pauses "Project Freedom" to move ships through the Strait of Hormuz as Iran tensions and negotiations continue.

title: New UT Poll Shows Texans Split From Trump on Iran
shortDescription: A new poll reveals how Texans feel about the U.S.-Iran conflict, military action, and key issues ahead of primary runoffs.

title: Susan Page analyzes Indiana state senate primaries
shortDescription: In Indiana's GOP primary, President Donald Trump demonstrated continued clout. Of seven GOP senators he opposed, at least 5 lost their nominations.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump's GOP clout tested
shortDescription: Candidates backed by the president have a good showing. Here is the news to know on Wednesday.

title: Indiana primary election results: Who won races for US House?
shortDescription: Voters chose candidates to run in November's midterms.

title: Trump says bombing will resume if Iran rejects peace deal: live
shortDescription: Trump said if Iran agrees to a framework for a peace deal, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz, the war could end. Otherwise, bombing will resume

title: Still the boss: Trump ousts Indiana state senators who defied him
shortDescription: The president has troubles, with gas prices up and approval ratings down. But in Indiana's primary, he showed his continued power among Republicans.

title: Trump teaches students his signature dance at White House
shortDescription: Trump showed students his signature fist‑pumping dance during a White House fitness event celebrating National Physical Fitness and Sports Month.

title: Second judge rules Trump administration can't review reporter's devices
shortDescription: The federal judge's order said a previous ruling implementing the block "was not clearly erroneous or contrary to law."

title: New charge brought against suspect in Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: Cole Tomas Allen, accused of trying to assassinate President Trump at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, is facing a new charge.
